query:
insert into items (
                    item_id,
                    kind,
                    title,
                    description,
                    icon
                )
                select
                    iss.item_id,
                    iss.kind,
                    iss.title,
                    iss.description,
                    iss.icon
                from items_staging iss
                where not exists (
                    select 1 from items
                    where items.item_id = iss.item_id
                    and items.kind = iss.kind
                )
                and iss.kind = ?;
